title: Salam Gembira
overview: Moe, a Singaporean Malay-Muslim man, cohabits with his Dutch girlfriend Samantha in The Netherlands, which is forbidden in Islam. When his devout Muslim parents surprise him with a visit, Moe gets Samantha to switch places with her gay brother, Daniel, so that their relationship will remain a secret. Before long, Moe’s parents start to suspect that their son is gay too.
